form.formComment: Puts an unbeaten record on the line. Had his first run for this campaign last start favourite; came from midfield and won by 0.7 len at Sapphire Coast Cl1 March 30 over 1000m in soft going defeating Lantau Island with 61kg at $2.70. Going well. Progressive gelding undefeated in two starts, respect in this tougher race.
